narrative:
Crestview Local Sd (Columbiana) school district has 3,729 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.8 percentage points.
